recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: Flyboys
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, History, Romance, War
recommendations.overview: The adventures of the Lafayette Escadrille, young Americans who volunteered for the French military before the U.S. entered World War I, and became the country's first fighter pilots.

recommendations.title: The Imitation Game
recommendations.overview: Based on the real life story of legendary cryptanalyst Alan Turing, the film portrays the nail-biting race against time by Turing and his brilliant team of code-breakers at Britain's top-secret Government Code and Cypher School at Bletchley Park, dur

recommendations.title: Into the White
recommendations.overview: During World War II, enemy fighter pilots find themselves face to face after shooting down one another's planes over a desolate landscape. In order to survive, they must set aside the rules of war.

recommendations.title: 303 Squadron
recommendations.overview: After the fall of the September Campaign of 1939, two Polish pilots are forced to fight for their nation in foreign battlefronts.

recommendations.title: Outlaws - For Greater Glory
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the Cristeros War (1926-1929), which was touched off by a rebellion against the Mexican government's attempt to secularize the country.

recommendations.title: Kesari
recommendations.overview: In 1897, an army of 21 Sikhs battles 10,000 Afghans to prevent the Saragarhi Fort from being taken down.

recommendations.title: Air Strike
recommendations.overview: An American pilot is sent to a Chinese province to teach a crew of would-be pilots how to fly war planes against the Japanese during World War II.

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.
